title: Disney Frozen Olaf Money Box with Window
features: This superb 3D money bank measuring 7" X 4" (18cm X 10cm) is made is in the image of Olaf the snowman from Disney's Frozen II
It is unique as it has a viewing window on the front to see the coins saved inside.
The coins are put through a slot on the back and there is an 'easy open' cover on the back to remove the coins.
This money bank is quirky and different and a perfect gift for any Frozen fan to encourage them to save their pennies.
With the see through front it would be really cool to give this as a gift and fill it with coins!
Supplied in glossy picture gift box.
